title: Roasted Velvet Italian Hazelnut Tart
description: A decadent dairyfree tart featuring a dark cocoa crust, roasted hazelnuts, and a gooey chocolatemaple filling, perfect for a romantic evening.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 °F (180 °C). Line a 9‑inch tart pan with parchment paper.
In a bowl whisk together flour, cocoa powder, and salt.
Add coconut oil, brown sugar, egg, and vanilla; mix until a crumbly dough forms.
Press the dough into the prepared tart pan, ensuring even thickness; bake 12‑15 min or until set. Remove and set aside to cool.
Meanwhile, combine hazelnuts, chocolate chips, maple syrup, and almond milk in a saucepan; heat gently over low heat until the chocolate melts and the mixture is glossy.
Pour the hazelnut‑chocolate filling over the cooled crust, smoothing the top.
Return the tart to the oven and bake for an additional 8‑10 min, until the edges are set but the center remains slightly soft.
Cool on a wire rack for 10 min, then slice and serve warm or at room temperature.
